The Philosophy Pricing
Follow the Build →

Most people can't remember
what happened last Tuesday.

Little Moments fixes that — a two-minute daily practice that captures one story-worthy moment from your day, builds a searchable memory archive, and quietly turns you into someone who notices their own life.

Download for iOS — Free Read the philosophy

14-day free trial  ·  No credit card required

Keep the moments that matter Find stories in your everyday A two-minute daily practice One moment, every day Your life is already remarkable Keep the moments that matter Find stories in your everyday A two-minute daily practice One moment, every day Your life is already remarkable
The Practice · 1 of 3

The two-minute practice that changes how you see your days.

Each night, you answer one question: what was the most interesting thing that happened today? Not the most impressive. Not the most dramatic. Just the thing that made today different from yesterday. You can type it. You can speak it. You can drop in a photo. Two minutes. That's it. The strange thing is what happens after a few weeks. You start noticing things during the day because you know you'll have to pick something tonight.

The Theory · 2 of 3

The best moments aren't the biggest ones.

Great stories aren't about extraordinary events. They're about the 1-degree turn — the small internal shift, the glance across a table, the sentence that changes everything. The moment you almost missed. Most people think they're not good storytellers because nothing interesting happens to them. That's not the problem. The problem is they haven't learned to look closely at what does. Little Moments teaches you to look closely.

The Result · 3 of 3

Your stories are already there. You just need to find them.

After a year of this practice, you'll have hundreds of entries. Moments you would have completely forgotten. A record of who you actually were — not who you thought you were, but who you really were, day by day. That record becomes something you genuinely treasure. Not because the moments were big. But because they were real. And you kept them.

Why it works

Two minutes a day.
A life worth remembering.

You're not going to remember last Tuesday. Or the week after. Or most of next month. Little Moments captures what would otherwise disappear — one moment at a time, every day, until you have an archive of your own life.

Download for iOS — Free
Write Daily Moments

One moment.
Every day.

The Today screen is a clean, unhurried space for your daily entry. Write it, speak it, photograph it. The streak keeps you honest. The practice builds the habit.

  • Streak counter tracks your daily consistency
  • Rich text, photo, and video attachments
  • Voice-to-text transcription built in
  • Writing prompts when you're stuck
  • Add entries for up to six past days
Go Deeper

Find what the
moment really means.

Go Deeper is a conversation that asks the questions great storytellers ask — who was there, what did you feel, what changed. It returns an enhanced version written in your voice.

  • Reads your entry and asks 2–3 targeted follow-up questions
  • Guided by principles of specificity, feeling, transformation
  • Returns an enhanced version written in your own voice
  • Full conversation saved with the entry
Your Time Capsule

Every moment you've saved.
Instantly searchable.

Your complete memory archive — every entry searchable by keyword, date, feeling, or person. Search "dad" and find every moment involving your father. Search "rain" and see what rain has meant to you across years.

  • Full-text search across every entry you've ever written
  • Cinematic 3D scroll view through your timeline
  • List view grouped by month, day, or year
  • Every moment preserved, never deleted
Memory Race

One word. Two minutes.
See where you end up.

A timed freewriting practice. One word. Two minutes. Start writing and do not stop. No editing. No backspacing. See where the word takes you — often somewhere you forgot you'd been.

  • Daily word prompt — same word for every user that day
  • Timer counts down, then continues negative — you decide when to stop
  • Type or dictate your race
  • Apply Go Deeper to extract real stories from the freewrite
Chapters

Your month,
made into a story.

At the end of each month, Little Moments takes everything you captured and builds you a Chapter. A beautifully designed, narrative recap that connects your moments into something you'd actually want to read.

  • We help connect the dots between your moments to find the real themes
  • Generates a photo collage from your media attachments
  • Written from your words — not a summary, a story
  • Share with family or keep privately
  • 12 Chapters a year — 12 months of your actual life
Rewind

Spin through your past.
Make it a moment.

Spin through individual random photos from your camera roll. Spin the wheel. Roll the dice. Land on something from years ago. One tap opens the composer with the photo attached — date pre-filled from when you took it.

  • Spin through individual random photos from your camera roll
  • Dice button for a completely random memory from any era
  • Composer opens with photo attached and date pre-set
  • Add entries with month-only or year-only precision
Story Coaching

Your daily storytelling
coach.

An opt-in coach trained on the craft of storytelling. It analyzes your raw moments, gives feedback on structure, pacing, and detail — and sets you small daily challenges to sharpen how you notice and tell stories.

  • Opt-in analysis of your daily moments
  • Trained on the craft of storytelling
  • Feedback on structure, pacing, and detail
  • Daily challenges to improve your storytelling
